title: Full-Stack JavaScript
description: Go from frontend to full-stack. Master advanced JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, and authentication -- with a build project in every module.

modules.title: Advanced JavaScript (ES6+)
modules.project: Utility Library -- build a mini Lodash with ES6+ features

modules.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
modules.project: Async Data Dashboard -- fetch and display data from multiple APIs

modules.title: APIs & JSON
modules.project: API Explorer -- build a tool to browse and test public APIs

modules.title: React.js Fundamentals
modules.project: Component Library -- build a reusable UI component kit in React

modules.title: React State & Hooks
modules.project: Shopping Cart -- build a cart with global state and persistent storage

modules.title: Node.js & Express
modules.project: REST API Server -- build a CRUD API with Express and validation

modules.title: SQL & PostgreSQL
modules.project: Bookstore Database -- design a schema and write complex queries

modules.title: Full-Stack Integration
modules.project: Full-Stack Blog -- connect a React frontend to an Express/Postgres backend

modules.title: Authentication & Security
modules.project: Secure Auth System -- add signup, login, sessions, and protected routes

modules.title: Capstone: Full-Stack Application
modules.project: Full-Stack Capstone -- build and deploy a complete web application

author: We Build Black
